item.title: Novenas you can start today - 07 April
item.description:
Blessed Arcangelo Canetoli
Blessed Contardo Deste
Blessed Joachim Piccolomini
Blessed Mikel Suma
Martyrs Of Avrille
Martyrs Of Corinth
Martyrs Of Saragossa
Saint Benedict Joseph Labre
Saint Bernadette Of Lourdes
Saint Drogo
Saint Elias
Saint Fructuosus Of Braga
Saint Herveus Of Tours
Saint Lambert Of Saragossa
Saint Lambert Of Saragossa 2
Saint Magnus Of Orkney
Saint Turibius Of Astorga
Saint Vaise
Saint William Gnoffi

Feast Day: 16 April
Start Date: 07 April
End Date: 15 April
